006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.math.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
025
026/**
027 * Reference implementation of the public {@link TokenWriter} surface for the MessagePack format.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * MessagePack containers are length-prefixed (no indefinite-length encoding); the writer therefore
031 * <b>buffers</b> each open container's body bytes until {@link #endObject()} / {@link #endArray()}
032 * is called, then writes the length-prefix header followed by the buffered bytes.  Memory cost
033 * is O(largest open container).
034 *
035 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
036 *    <li class='warn'>This class is not thread safe.
037 *    <li>{@code byte[]} values dispatch to native MsgPack {@code bin}, not to a base64 string fallback.
038 * </ul>
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "resource" // The writer's underlying OutputStream is owned by the caller via try-with-resources on the writer itself; Eclipse JDT flags the inner stream as unclosed but that's by design.
042})
043public class MsgPackTokenWriter implements TokenWriter {
044
045   /**
046    * Cursor-level settings honored by {@link MsgPackTokenWriter}.
047    *
048    * @param walk The {@link PojoWalker.Options walk options} used by {@link #object(Object)}.
049    */
050   @SuppressWarnings("javadoc")
051   public record Settings(PojoWalker.Options walk) {
052
053      /** Default canonical setting: default walk options. */
054      public static final Settings DEFAULT = new Settings(PojoWalker.Options.DEFAULT);
055   }
056
057   private final OutputStream finalOut;
058   private final Closeable owned;
059   private final Settings settings;
060
061   // Per-level buffers.  The active write target is the top of this stack; if depth==0 we write
062   // directly to finalOut.
063   private final java.util.ArrayDeque<ByteArrayOutputStream> buffers = new java.util.ArrayDeque<>();
064   // Per-level container kind: true=map, false=array.
065   private final java.util.ArrayDeque<Boolean> isMapStack = new java.util.ArrayDeque<>();
066   // Per-level element-count (for arrays = number of values emitted; for maps = number of pairs).
067   // For maps, incremented once per field() (= once per pair).
068   private final java.util.ArrayDeque<Integer> elementCount = new java.util.ArrayDeque<>();
069   // Per-level: for maps, true when the next emit should be a field (key), false after the
070   // field when the next emit should be the value.
071   private final java.util.ArrayDeque<Boolean> awaitingKey = new java.util.ArrayDeque<>();
072
073   private boolean closed;
074
075   /**
076    * Constructor with default settings.
077    *
078    * @param out The {@link OutputStream} to emit MsgPack to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
079    */
080   public MsgPackTokenWriter(OutputStream out) {
081      this(out, null, Settings.DEFAULT);
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Constructor with explicit settings.
086    *
087    * @param out The {@link OutputStream} to emit MsgPack to.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
088    * @param settings The settings.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
089    */
090   public MsgPackTokenWriter(OutputStream out, Settings settings) {
091      this(out, null, settings);
092   }
093
094   private MsgPackTokenWriter(OutputStream out, Closeable owned, Settings settings) {
095      assertArgNotNull("out", out);
096      assertArgNotNull("settings", settings);
097      this.finalOut = out;
098      this.owned = owned;
099      this.settings = settings;
100   }
101
102   /**
103    * Internal factory used by {@link MsgPackSerializerSession#serializeTokens(Object)} to coerce
104    * supported output types ({@link OutputStream}, {@link File}) to a MsgPack writer.
105    *
106    * @param output The output object.
107    * @param settings The settings.
108    * @return A new {@link MsgPackTokenWriter}.
109    * @throws IOException If the output type is not supported or could not be opened.
110    */
111   public static MsgPackTokenWriter forOutput(Object output, Settings settings) throws IOException {
112      if (output == null)
113         throw new IOException("Output cannot be null.");
114      if (output instanceof OutputStream os)
115         return new MsgPackTokenWriter(os, null, settings);
116      if (output instanceof File f) {
117         var os = new BufferedOutputStream(new FileOutputStream(f));
118         return new MsgPackTokenWriter(os, os, settings);
119      }
120      throw new IOException("Cannot convert object of type " + output.getClass().getName() + " to an OutputStream.");
121   }
122
123   /** The active write target for child bytes (top buffer or finalOut). */
124   private OutputStream activeOut() {
125      return buffers.isEmpty() ? finalOut : buffers.peek();
126   }
127
128   @Override /* TokenWriter */
129   public TokenWriter startObject() throws IOException {
130      assertOpen();
131      // Push a new buffer; child writes go there until endObject.
132      buffers.push(new ByteArrayOutputStream());
133      isMapStack.push(true);
134      elementCount.push(0);
135      awaitingKey.push(true);
136      return this;
137   }
138
139   @Override /* TokenWriter */
140   public TokenWriter endObject() throws IOException {
141      assertOpen();
142      if (buffers.isEmpty() || !Boolean.TRUE.equals(isMapStack.peek()))
143         throw new IllegalStateException("endObject called with no matching startObject");
144      var body = buffers.pop();
145      var count = elementCount.pop();
146      isMapStack.pop();
147      awaitingKey.pop();
148      // Write the map header to whatever is now the active stream, then the buffered body.
149      var header = new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut());
150      header.startMap(count);
151      body.writeTo(activeOut());
152      afterValue();
153      return this;
154   }
155
156   @Override /* TokenWriter */
157   public TokenWriter startArray() throws IOException {
158      assertOpen();
159      buffers.push(new ByteArrayOutputStream());
160      isMapStack.push(false);
161      elementCount.push(0);
162      awaitingKey.push(false);
163      return this;
164   }
165
166   @Override /* TokenWriter */
167   public TokenWriter endArray() throws IOException {
168      assertOpen();
169      if (buffers.isEmpty() || Boolean.TRUE.equals(isMapStack.peek()))
170         throw new IllegalStateException("endArray called with no matching startArray");
171      var body = buffers.pop();
172      var count = elementCount.pop();
173      isMapStack.pop();
174      awaitingKey.pop();
175      var header = new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut());
176      header.startArray(count);
177      body.writeTo(activeOut());
178      afterValue();
179      return this;
180   }
181
182   @Override /* TokenWriter */
183   public TokenWriter fieldName(String name) throws IOException {
184      assertOpen();
185      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
186      if (isMapStack.isEmpty() || !Boolean.TRUE.equals(isMapStack.peek()))
187         throw new IllegalStateException("field called outside an object");
188      if (!Boolean.TRUE.equals(awaitingKey.peek()))
189         throw new IllegalStateException("field called twice without an intervening value");
190      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendString(name);
191      // Replace top of awaitingKey with false (we just wrote the key; expect a value next).
192      awaitingKey.pop();
193      awaitingKey.push(false);
194      // Increment pair count once (per pair) — happens at the field, not the value.
195      var c = elementCount.pop();
196      elementCount.push(c + 1);
197      return this;
198   }
199
200   @Override /* TokenWriter */
201   public TokenWriter string(String value) throws IOException {
202      assertOpen();
203      if (value == null)
204         return nil();
205      preValueCheck();
206      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendString(value);
207      afterValue();
208      return this;
209   }
210
211   @Override /* TokenWriter */
212   public TokenWriter number(Number value) throws IOException {
213      assertOpen();
214      if (value == null)
215         return nil();
216      preValueCheck();
217      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendNumber(value);
218      afterValue();
219      return this;
220   }
221
222   @Override /* TokenWriter */
223   public TokenWriter number(long value) throws IOException {
224      assertOpen();
225      preValueCheck();
226      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendLong(value);
227      afterValue();
228      return this;
229   }
230
231   @Override /* TokenWriter */
232   public TokenWriter number(double value) throws IOException {
233      assertOpen();
234      preValueCheck();
235      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendDouble(value);
236      afterValue();
237      return this;
238   }
239
240   @Override /* TokenWriter */
241   public TokenWriter number(BigDecimal value) throws IOException {
242      assertOpen();
243      if (value == null)
244         return nil();
245      preValueCheck();
246      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendDouble(value.doubleValue());
247      afterValue();
248      return this;
249   }
250
251   @Override /* TokenWriter */
252   public TokenWriter number(BigInteger value) throws IOException {
253      assertOpen();
254      if (value == null)
255         return nil();
256      preValueCheck();
257      // Align with the databind serializer path (G4): long-range -> INT64, [2^63,2^64-1] -> UINT64,
258      // otherwise throw — rather than the previous longValueExact() which threw on the representable
259      // [2^63,2^64-1] range.
260      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendBigInteger(value);
261      afterValue();
262      return this;
263   }
264
265   @Override /* TokenWriter */
266   public TokenWriter bool(boolean value) throws IOException {
267      assertOpen();
268      preValueCheck();
269      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendBoolean(value);
270      afterValue();
271      return this;
272   }
273
274   @Override /* TokenWriter */
275   public TokenWriter nil() throws IOException {
276      assertOpen();
277      preValueCheck();
278      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendNull();
279      afterValue();
280      return this;
281   }
282
283   @Override /* TokenWriter */
284   public TokenWriter binary(byte[] value) throws IOException {
285      assertOpen();
286      if (value == null)
287         return nil();
288      preValueCheck();
289      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).appendBinary(value);
290      afterValue();
291      return this;
292   }
293
294   @Override /* TokenWriter */
295   public MsgPackTokenWriter writeExt(int type, byte[] payload) throws IOException {
296      assertOpen();
297      if (payload == null)
298         throw new IllegalArgumentException("ext payload must not be null");
299      preValueCheck();
300      new MsgPackOutputStream(activeOut()).writeExt(type, payload);
301      afterValue();
302      return this;
303   }
304
305   @Override /* TokenWriter */
306   public TokenWriter object(Object value) throws IOException {
307      assertOpen();
308      PojoWalker.walk(this, value, settings.walk);
309      return this;
310   }
311
312   @Override /* TokenWriter */
313   public boolean isStreaming() { return true; }
314
315   @Override /* TokenWriter */
316   public void flush() throws IOException { finalOut.flush(); }
317
318   @Override /* TokenWriter */
319   public void close() throws IOException {
320      if (closed)
321         return;
322      closed = true;
323      try {
324         finalOut.flush();
325      } finally {
326         if (owned != null)
327            owned.close();
328      }
329   }
330
331   /**
332    * Throws an {@link IOException} if this writer has been {@link #close() closed}.
333    *
334    * @throws IOException If this writer is closed.
335    */
336   private void assertOpen() throws IOException {
337      if (closed)
338         throw new IOException("Token writer is closed.");
339   }
340
341   private void preValueCheck() {
342      // At map-key position, value emits are illegal — caller must call field() first.
343      if (!isMapStack.isEmpty() && Boolean.TRUE.equals(isMapStack.peek()) && Boolean.TRUE.equals(awaitingKey.peek()))
344         throw new IllegalStateException(
345            "Value emitted at map-key position without preceding field(...).");
346   }
347
348   private void afterValue() {
349      if (isMapStack.isEmpty())
350         return;
351      // After emitting a value:
352      // - In a map, flip awaitingKey back to true (next emit is the next pair's key).
353      // - In an array, increment element count.
354      if (Boolean.TRUE.equals(isMapStack.peek())) {
355         awaitingKey.pop();
356         awaitingKey.push(true);
357      } else {
358         var c = elementCount.pop();
359         elementCount.push(c + 1);
360      }
361   }
362}
